entries.title: Did you get a chance to review my previous email?

entries.content:
I appreciate if you could let me know your interest in acquiring the
Attendee list.

entries.content:

Sent: Wednesday, March 29, 2023 12:30 PM

Subject: Random Expo Expo 2023
Importance: High

entries.title: Wishing you all the best for Random Expo Conferenc...
entries.content: Wishing you all the best for Random Expo Conference & Expo2023.

entries.title: Could you let me know if you want to receive Pre-S...
entries.content:
Could you let me know if you want to receive Pre-Show Registered =
Attendee
list  by emails?

fall at your booth.

entries.content: If not reply " we=B4re not interested".

entries.title: <META HTTP-EQUIV=3D"Content-Type" CONTENT=3D"text/...
entries.content:
Hi,

 

Did you get a chance to review my previous = email?

 

I appreciate if you could let me know your interest in acquiring the = Attendee list.

 

Regards,

Someone Real

 

From:= = Someone Real [mailto:email@domain.com]
Sent: Wednesday, = March 29, 2023 12:30 PM
To: = 'email@domain.com'
Subject: Random Expo Expo = 2023
Importance: High

 

 

 

Dear = Exhibitor,

 

Wishing you all the best for Random Expo = Conference & Expo2023.

 

Could you = let me know if you want to receive Pre-Show Registered Attendee = list  by emails?

 

You can send = Pre-Show Invitation mailers using these lists and increase foot fall at = your booth.

 

Reply as  “ Yes we’re = interested”.

 

If not reply = " we=B4re not interested".

 

Regards,

Emma = Pearson - (Events & Tradeshow Specialist)

 

------=_NextPart_001_234A_01D9630F.FB2474F0--
